# Regal Pillow

## Description

Whenever you Rest, heal an additional 15 HP.

---

## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.

- Increases the value of rest-site-rich routes; at low current HP, Rest can overtake Smith because it adds +15 HP to the normal heal.
